connect.phonenumber.CfnAbout: Claims a phone number to the specified Amazon Connect instance or traffic distribution group.

connect.phonenumber.CountryCode.Allowed values: AD | AE | AF | AG | AI | AL | AM | AN | AO | AQ | AR | AS | AT | AU | AW | AZ | BA | BB | BD | BE | BF | BG | BH | BI | BJ | BL | BM | BN | BO | BR | BS | BT | BW | BY | BZ | CA | CC | CD | CF | CG | CH | CI | CK | CL | CM | CN | CO | CR | CU | CV | CW | CX | CY | CZ | DE | DJ | DK | DM | DO | DZ | EC | EE | EG | EH | ER | ES | ET | FI | FJ | FK | FM | FO | FR | GA | GB | GD | GE | GG | GH | GI | GL | GM | GN | GQ | GR | GT | GU | GW | GY | HK | HN | HR | HT | HU | ID | IE | IL | IM | IN | IO | IQ | IR | IS | IT | JE | JM | JO | JP | KE | KG | KH | KI | KM | KN | KP | KR | KW | KY | KZ | LA | LB | LC | LI | LK | LR | LS | LT | LU | LV | LY | MA | MC | MD | ME | MF | MG | MH | MK | ML | MM | MN | MO | MP | MR | MS | MT | MU | MV | MW | MX | MY | MZ | NA | NC | NE | NG | NI | NL | NO | NP | NR | NU | NZ | OM | PA | PE | PF | PG | PH | PK | PL | PM | PN | PR | PT | PW | PY | QA | RE | RO | RS | RU | RW | SA | SB | SC | SD | SE | SG | SH | SI | SJ | SK | SL | SM | SN | SO | SR | ST | SV | SX | SY | SZ | TC | TD | TG | TH | TJ | TK | TL | TM | TN | TO | TR | TT | TV | TW | TZ | UA | UG | US | UY | UZ | VA | VC | VE | VG | VI | VN | VU | WF | WS | YE | YT | ZA | ZM | ZW

connect.phonenumber.Description.Description: The description of the phone number.

connect.phonenumber.Prefix.Description: The prefix of the phone number. If provided, it must contain `+` as part of the country code.

connect.phonenumber.Tags.Description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource. For example, { "tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.

connect.phonenumber.TargetArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for Amazon Connect instances or traffic distribution group that phone numbers are claimed to.

connect.phonenumber.Type.Allowed values: DID | SHARED | THIRD_PARTY_DID | THIRD_PARTY_TF | TOLL_FREE | UIFN
